abilities.description: Choose a card type. Target opponent reveals their hand. CARDNAME deals 3 damage to that player for each card of the chosen type revealed this way. (Artifact, battle, creature, enchantment, instant, kindred, land, planeswalker, and sorcery are card types.)

effect.description: Choose a card type. Target opponent reveals their hand. CARDNAME deals 3 damage to that player for each card of the chosen type revealed this way. (Artifact, battle, creature, enchantment, instant, kindred, land, planeswalker, and sorcery are card types.)
effect.name: ChooseType
